options.minimap.waypoints.title: Waypoint Options
options.minimap.waypoints.distanceUnitCo: If the distance to the waypoint in meters exceeds the configured value, the distance is displayed in kilometers.
options.minimap.mobs.title: Show or Hide Individual Mob Types
options.minimap.moveMapBelowStatusEffect: Move Map Below Status Effect Icons

controls.minimap.unbind1: To unbind a key, select it and press 'Escape'.
controls.minimap.unbind2: (Except for the Menu Key - it can't be unbound)

minimap.waypoints.name: Waypoint Name
minimap.waypoints.errorSavingWaypoints: An error occurred while saving waypoints.
minimap.waypoints.errorLoadingWaypoints: An error occurred while loading waypoints.
minimap.waypoints.noWaypointsExist: No waypoints exist for this world/server.

minimap.waypoints.iconPicker.title: Choose Icon
minimap.waypointShare.title: Share Waypoint
worldmap.title: VoxelMap
options.worldmap.title: Worldmap Options
worldmap.disabled: The Worldmap is disabled on this server.
worldmap.multiworld.title: VoxelMap - Multiworld Selection
worldmap.multiworld.explanation: Say 'no' if you don't know, you can change your mind later.
worldmap.multiworld.foundWorld2: If this is not correct, select your current world in the Multiworld screen.
worldmap.multiworld.unknownSubworld: Unknown world!  Please select your current world in the Multiworld screen.
worldmap.subworld.name: Multiworld Name
voxelmap.update.prefix: A new version of VoxelMap is available (%s).
options.voxelmap.entityDialog.title: Individual Creature Types
options.voxelmap.controls.unbindHelp: Select a binding and press Escape to unbind it. The menu key cannot be unbound.
options.voxelmap.requires.seed: A world seed is required to identify slime chunks.
options.voxelmap.requires.radar: Enable the radar and the required entity type first.
options.voxelmap.requires.entityCategory: Enable the radar and at least one creature category first.
options.voxelmap.managed.serverDisabled: This setting is disabled by the server.
options.voxelmap.managed.server: This value is provided by the server.
options.voxelmap.managed.singleplayerSee: The seed is read from the local world.
options.voxelmap.managed.renderer: The compatibility renderer is required by the current renderer.
options.voxelmap.minimap.visible.tooltip: Controls whether the minimap is visible without disabling its other settings.
options.voxelmap.minimap.location.toolti: Selects the screen corner in which the minimap is displayed.
options.voxelmap.minimap.size.tooltip: Changes the size of the minimap on the HUD.
options.voxelmap.minimap.shape.tooltip: Displays the minimap as a round or square map.
options.voxelmap.minimap.orientation.too: Keeps north at the top or rotates the map with your view.
options.voxelmap.minimap.coordinates.too: Hides coordinates or displays them using the horizontal or classic layout.
options.voxelmap.minimap.biome.tooltip: Displays the name of the biome you are currently in.
options.voxelmap.minimap.caves.tooltip: Uses an underground map when terrain blocks the surface view.
options.voxelmap.minimap.chunkGrid.toolt: Draws chunk boundaries over the minimap.
options.voxelmap.minimap.slimeChunks.too: Highlights chunks in which slimes can spawn. Multiplayer requires the correct seed.
options.voxelmap.minimap.worldBorder.too: Draws the configured world border on the minimap.
options.voxelmap.minimap.effects.tooltip: Moves the minimap to avoid overlapping status effect icons.
options.voxelmap.minimap.scoreboard.tool: Moves the scoreboard below the minimap when both occupy the same side.
options.voxelmap.waypoints.visible.toolt: Shows waypoint markers in the game world.
options.voxelmap.waypoints.style.tooltip: Selects whether waypoints use vertical beams, icons, or both.
options.voxelmap.waypoints.distance.tool: Limits how far away in-world waypoints remain visible.
options.voxelmap.waypoints.scale.tooltip: Changes the size of in-world waypoint icons.
options.voxelmap.waypoints.names.tooltip: Displays the waypoint name near its icon.
Places waypoint names above or below their icons.
options.voxelmap.waypoints.distances.too: Displays the distance to each visible waypoint.
options.voxelmap.waypoints.distancePosit: Places distances relative to the icon or its name label.
options.voxelmap.waypoints.units.tooltip: Switches long waypoint distances from meters to kilometers at the selected threshold.
options.voxelmap.waypoints.deathpoints.t: Creates a waypoint at your position when you die.
options.voxelmap.waypoints.deathpointRet: Keeps only the newest deathpoint or all recorded deathpoints.
options.voxelmap.radar.visible.tooltip: Shows nearby players and creatures on the minimap.
options.voxelmap.radar.mode.tooltip: Simple markers are compact; entity icons provide detailed creature and equipment rendering.
options.voxelmap.radar.elevation.tooltip: Indicates whether an entity is above or below you.
options.voxelmap.radar.invisible.tooltip: Prevents invisible entities from appearing on the radar.
options.voxelmap.radar.players.tooltip: Shows nearby players on the radar when allowed by the server.
options.voxelmap.radar.playerNames.toolt: Displays player names next to their radar icons.
options.voxelmap.radar.playerHelmets.too: Renders player helmets on detailed radar icons.
options.voxelmap.radar.sneaking.tooltip: Hides players who are currently sneaking.
options.voxelmap.radar.facing.tooltip: Shows the direction in which a player or creature is facing in simple mode.
options.voxelmap.radar.hostiles.tooltip: Shows hostile creatures on the radar.
options.voxelmap.radar.neutrals.tooltip: Shows neutral and peaceful creatures on the radar.
options.voxelmap.radar.individualEntitie: Opens a filterable list for showing or hiding individual hostile, neutral, and peaceful creature types.
options.voxelmap.radar.mobNames.tooltip: Displays creature names next to detailed radar icons.
options.voxelmap.radar.mobHelmets.toolti: Renders equipped helmets on detailed creature icons.
options.voxelmap.radar.fullNames.tooltip: Uses full entity names instead of shortened labels.
options.voxelmap.radar.filtering.tooltip: Smooths detailed radar icons. Disable for a sharper pixel-art appearance.
options.voxelmap.radar.outlines.tooltip: Adds outlines to detailed radar icons for better contrast.
options.voxelmap.worldmap.coordinates.to: Displays coordinates while viewing the full-screen world map.
options.voxelmap.worldmap.waypoints.tool: Displays waypoints on the full-screen world map.
options.voxelmap.worldmap.names.tooltip: Displays waypoint names on the full-screen world map.
options.voxelmap.worldmap.distant.toolti: Keeps waypoints visible even when they are far outside the mapped area.
options.voxelmap.worldmap.nearestZoom.to: Sets how far the world map may zoom in. Changing this can also adjust the cache requirement.
options.voxelmap.worldmap.farthestZoom.t: Sets how far the world map may zoom out.
options.voxelmap.worldmap.cache.tooltip: Larger caches use more memory but reduce map-region reloading.
options.voxelmap.advanced.lighting.toolt: Updates map brightness using nearby dynamic light sources.
options.voxelmap.advanced.terrain.toolti: Uses height, slope, or both to make terrain relief visible.
options.voxelmap.advanced.water.tooltip: Shows terrain through water. This may cost performance on single-core rendering.
options.voxelmap.advanced.blocks.tooltip: Shows terrain through translucent blocks. This may cost performance on single-core rendering.
options.voxelmap.advanced.biomes.tooltip: Tints terrain using biome colors. This may cost performance on single-core rendering.
options.voxelmap.advanced.biomeOverlay.t: Overlays biomes using transparent or solid colors.
options.voxelmap.advanced.filtering.tool: Smooths map textures when they are scaled.
options.voxelmap.advanced.seed.tooltip: The seed is needed for features such as slime-chunk detection on multiplayer worlds.
options.voxelmap.advanced.teleport.toolt: Command template used by waypoint teleportation. Available placeholders include %p, %x, %y, and %z.
options.voxelmap.advanced.compatibilityR: Uses a compatibility path for renderer mods such as Vulkan-based renderers. Minor visual artifacts may occur.
options.voxelmap.advanced.colorPicker.to: Selects the compact or full color picker used when editing waypoints.
options.voxelmap.advanced.updates.toolti: Notifies you when a new VoxelMap version is available.
